authors.name: CringeWorthy Staff
authors.bio: The CringeWorthy Staff team brings you the most sensational and cringeworthy stories from around the world.

authors.name: Michael Chen
authors.bio: Michael Chen specializes in reporting on bizarre social phenomena and uncomfortable cultural trends.

authors.name: Sarah Johnson
authors.bio: Sarah Johnson digs deep into the strange and unsettling corners of everyday life to bring you stories that will make you squirm.
